query: SELECT b.id, b.guestName, b.guestEmail, b.requestedDate, b.mealType, b.numberOfGuests, h.title, h.email FROM bookings b JOIN host_listings h ON b.hostListingId = h.id WHERE b.id = '720001'
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user JF4SDJ8UQnAgkD3.root --database mkW6ExSEHJcqGWsa6M4fqn --execute SELECT b.id, b.guestName, b.guestEmail, b.requestedDate, b.mealType, b.numberOfGuests, h.title, h.email FROM bookings b JOIN host_listings h ON b.hostListingId = h.id WHERE b.id = '720001'
